name: audit
description: Compliance-grade audit trail. Thin wrapper around owen-it/laravel-auditing with our conventions: KMS-encrypted old/new values for restricted-tier fields, ULID prefix `aud_`, tenant scoping via BelongsToTenantOptional (system-level audits carry tenant_id=NULL), 365d hot + 2555d cold retention (7y), platform-admin-only HTTP surface, optional tamper-evident hash chain per row for enterprise plans. Publishes `HasAudit` trait and `#[Auditable]` attribute. Distinct from `activity` module which is tenant-facing + tier-based short retention.

wraps.rationale: Battle-tested audit trail with per-model contract + tamper-evident hooks. We inherit their schema + trait + add KMS encryption at rest + tenant scoping + 7y cold retention + optional hash-chain.

central_admin.description: Platform-admin cross-tenant audit search + DSAR export orchestration. No tenant-facing HTTP surface — audits are compliance evidence, not product UX.

tenant.description: Tenant admin has a minimal read surface for their OWN audit rows via /api/v1/audits — useful for tenant DPO. Sensitive fields still masked.
